name: Mammoth Turtle
bio: A living siege engine dragging the weight of the world to crush all in its path.

skills.name: Shell Smash
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to (75% of Attack Damage + 240), then permanently reduce enemy Armor by 16%.

skills.name: Indestructible
skills.description: Double self Armor and Magic Resist (does not stack).

skills.name: Armor Prioritized
skills.description: Permanently increase Armor by 10% and reduce Magic Resist by 6% (additively). Heal for 20 health and gain 5 Rage.

skills.name: Magic Resist Prioritized
skills.description: Permanently increase Magic Resist by 10% and reduce Armor by 6% (additively). Heal for 20 health and gain 10 Rage.

ultimate.name: Supreme Regeneration
ultimate.description: Heal for (80% of Magic Power + 500) health.
